---
title: "Teaching"
---

I taught the following courses at the [Faculty of Psychology](https://fpsi.uinjkt.ac.id/en/bachelor-of-psychology) at [Syarif Hidayatullah State Islamic University](https://uinjkt.ac.id/en)

## Courses

-   Basic Statistics

-   Linear Regression Analysis

-   Factor Analysis ([CFA Demo](https://github.com/waraalfa/CFA-demo))

-   Structural Equation Modeling

-   Psychometrics

##
